productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Blue Shirts
description: CompositionDark teal blue shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, full buttoned placket on the front, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, stitch detailing and pin tucks on the front and back, and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroiderySubtle and stylish, this dark teal blue shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The mandarin collar and pin tucks adds an interesting edge, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
